prompt_preview:
Campaign: Retail Spring Launch
Audience: performance marketers at retail brands
Objective: Speed up banner review without losing compliance
Key message: Review banner copy against brand and placement constraints before launch.
Strategy: tool_aware
Brand notes: Lead with the practical benefit before the feature., Prefer specific workflow language over hype.
Avoid terms: guaranteed, instant, #1, magic
Placement caps: headline=35 description=90 cta=18
Policy disallowed claims: guaranteed, instant, #1
